The World Cup has turned America into a discovery channel for the rest of the world.

And they are not handling it well.
In the best possible way.

Here is what they are discovering:

Free public restrooms. Europeans pay every time.
Free water at every restaurant. Just appears.

People hear: "Buy leaders. Cut losers. Let winners run."

And think: "That's it?"

That's like saying: "Just hit the baseball."

The idea is simple.

The problem is you're trying to hit a 98 MPH fastball while your account is down 12%, Twitter is screaming about the next hot

I repeat that over and over again: Don’t look at your P&L during the day!

It’s okay to do that once a week. But if you look at it during the trading session, you probably trade your P&L instead of charts.

I personally track only my CLOSED P&L. Only realized profits.

How I manage positions during the day 👇

1) I am at my trading desk the first 30m of the trading session. I execute my plan to buy or sell positions.
2) Stops are in place for all positions.
3) I have alerts for important price levels where I need to check a position (e.g. to
